title: JoJo Jr. Flannel Face Cloth (Pack of 6) Reusable Face Towels(25 * 25 cm) for Washing Face Baby Wash Cloth White Flannels Face Cloth (White, Regular)
features: Experience unparalleled softness with the world's softest face cloth, crafted from pure organic biodegradable Bamboo materials that are free from any plastic, ensuring a gentle touch on your skin while being kind to the planet.

Versatile convenience: Enjoy the practicality of our face flannels pack of 6, perfect for various uses from cleansing your face to being a reliable wash cloth body option, ensuring you always have a clean towel on hand.

Ample supply: With our flannels face cloth pack 12 and 6, you'll never run out of essential towels for your beauty regimen, providing you with the perfect solution for daily use and easy replacements.

Stylish and functional: Elevate your self-care routine with our facial towels, designed specifically as face clothes for women, combining elegance with practicality for a refreshing experience every time.

For Entire Family: - These multipurpose bamboo wash cloths are suitable for babies as well as adults and can be used as a makeup remover, face towels, small hand towels, kids flannels, cleaning cloth and burp cloth

Easy Care: Machine wash in cold water will enhance the fluffiness of baby wash cloths and threads will remain intact. Moreover, the original white elegant color will not fade for months if tumble dried in low heat

Eco-friendly choice: Our small towels are crafted from high-quality cotton face cloths, making them not only soft and absorbent but also a sustainable option for your home, reducing waste while enhancing your skincare routine.

[Multiple Usage for Reguarl and Disposable Face Towel] These regular and disposable face cloths have unmatched uses for beauty, baby care, face tissues/facial towels, general cleaning. The super strong technology will hold the towel together and these reusable and disposable face towels will be your care partner for longer time than any other towel for sure.
